src: Tamper Dev is an extension that allows you to intercept and edit HTTP/HTTPS requests and responses as they happen without the need of a proxy. Works across all operating systems (including Chrome OS).
ja: Tamper Devはプロキシ不要でHTTP/HTTPSのリクエストとレスポンスをリアルタイムに傍受・編集できる拡張機能です。すべてのOS（Chrome OSを含む）で動作します。
